_comment: FROZEN drain Read-reinjection guard. ensure-infra MERGES this single PreToolUse(Read) entry into the consumer's .claude/settings.json hooks.PreToolUse array — it never overwrites the file or other hooks. Blocks the gateway from Read-ing any .claude/worktrees/ path (a worktree-internal Read re-injects that worktree's nested CLAUDE.md + rules per file and blows the context budget). Tool-scoped to Read only (a permissions deny on the path would also block `cd` into the subtree and break dispatch). Guard clause: when CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is itself inside .claude/worktrees/, the hook passes through, so a subprocess reads its own tree freely — the block applies only to a session whose project root is the gateway tree. Parses the path off stdin JSON via jq (there is no $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH env var). exit 2 routes the agent to the read-around paths.

hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" | grep -qE '[/\\]\.claude[/\\]worktrees[/\\]'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.claude[/\\]worktrees[/\\]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: worktree-internal Read re-injects that worktree CLAUDE.md. Read-around: git show {branch}:<path> / Grep / Glob.' >&2; exit 2; fi
